releaseNotes: Major UI redesign with a cleaner and more modern Reelx experience
Improved local reels video playback for smoother scrolling and watching
Redesigned Folders page with better folder browsing and scroll support
Added new folder profile page to view folder-based videos more easily
Improved Discover page with better recent, history, trending, recommended, and suggested folder sections
Added More page with Settings, About App, Privacy Policy, App Version, Developer Portfolio, and More Apps
Added in-app update page with version info, download progress, APK size, and install flow
Improved fullscreen video support for both portrait and landscape videos
Fixed portrait video top-cut issue and improved video fit behavior
Improved landscape player gestures for brightness, volume, and double-tap skip
Added play/pause center feedback animation in portrait video mode
Improved permission page UI with a more polished app entry experience
Added About App and Privacy Policy pages
Improved bottom navigation visibility and page navigation
Fixed multiple UI spacing, scrolling, and layout issues
General bug fixes and performance improvements
